Title: Search flights from home page
Steps: 1. Go to blazedemo.com 2. Select departure/destination city 3. Click Find Flights
Expected Result: Reserve page shows a list of flights

Title: Select a flight and proceed to purchase
Steps: 1. Click 'Choose This Flight' on any row
Expected Result: Purchase page loads with a 'has been reserved' heading

Title: Complete purchase with valid billing details
Steps: 1. Fill billing/card fields 2. Click Purchase Flight
Expected Result: Confirmation page shows 'Thank you for your purchase today!'

Title: Confirmation heading is hardcoded (finding)
Preconditions: Completed a purchase for a different route
Steps: Compare confirmation heading city names against the route actually searched
Expected Result: Confirmation always reads 'TLV to SFO' regardless of the real route searched - documented finding, not a pass/fail bug

Title: Booking funnel responds within threshold under light load
Steps: Run the JMeter smoke test (5 users / 2 iterations)
